channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump endorses Paxton in Texas Senate runoff on eve of early voting
item.description: President Trump endorsed Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton in the Republican U.S. Senate runoff on Tuesday, a day after early voting began.

item.title: Graduates boo AI at college ceremonies
item.description: As AI reshapes majors and the job market, graduates express discontent with its growing role.

item.title: Trump meets on Iran war plans after attack pause
item.description: President Trump held a national security meeting on Iran that included a briefing on military options.

item.title: Health officials worry about Ebola containment
item.description: The ongoing Ebola surge raises concerns about global capacity to contain its spread.
